[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Nelanco Claude Code box: scope correction + PR1 provisioning artifacts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/658
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/276

  Details:
  Continued the Nelanco interactive-Claude-Code-box initiative. (1) Corrected the roadmap scope after Gary clarified: the box runs PLAIN interactive Claude Code (ssh -> tmux -> claude -> remote-control from the mobile app) with Sophia-parity environment + full fleet SSH — NOT a second autonomous Sophia; removed the autonomous stack + collision decision, promoted SSH-access parity to a first-class deliverable (PR #658). (2) Built PR1 provisioning artifacts in truesight_autopilot: launch_ec2_nelanco_claude.sh (account-guarded t3.medium in Nelanco, SSM-resolved Ubuntu AMI, encrypted EBS, EIP, no hardcoded Explorya values) + user-data-claude.sh (Sophia-parity toolchain + tmux + Claude Code, no autopilot services); both pass bash -n (PR #276). (3) Advanced the resume tracker to PR2 (PR #659). Code-only; launches no infra until Gate B.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
